roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
SENTENCING TX FILEDMOT FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED

/X:PLEA IS TO  TRANSPORTAION  OF CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE, NOT  SALE ,/ /AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ75D/CTS:75/DEF:HAS COMPLIED WITH PC 296/WS/11590/DTC/RX//SA2:MISSION STREET BETWEEN 16TH & 19TH STREETS, INCLUDING THE 16TH STREETBART STATION/SA2:THE INSIDE OF DOLORES PARK & FRANKLIN SQUARE PARK/DEF:SHALL NOT ASSOCIATE WITH PERSONS HE KNOWS TO BE GANG MEMBERS, INCLUDING ELIASCHAVES, CARLOS VASQUEZ, MICHALE REBOLLEDO, YUSEF NATHAN, FRANCISCO RIVERA,JONATHAN AGUILAR, WESTON VENEGAS, KAREEM LACAYO, MARIO REYES, ALDO TRONCOSCO, EDDIE URBINA, MIGUEL ORTIZ, EDON LACAYO & MARIO SERRANO/DEF:SHALL NOT WEAR GANG JEWELRY OR CLOTHING/DEF:SHALL NOT POSSESS GANG PARAPHERNALIA/DEF:SHALL NOT USE GANG HAND SIGNS/DEF:SHALL NOT POSSESS ANY GRAFFITI MATERIALS/SA2:ANY SCHOOL GROUNDS UNLESS ENROLLED OR ENROLLING IN THAT SCHOOL/DEF:SHALL NOT GET NEW GANG TATTOOS, & WILL LET ALL PRESENT TATTOOS BE PHOTOGRAPHED/SA2:ANY COURT PROCEEDINGS WHERE A KNOWN GANG MEMBER IS DEFENDANT OR WITNESS, UNLESS HE IS A DEFENDANT OR SUBPOENAED WITNESS/DEF:WILL COMPLY WITHANY SUBPOENA/WEAP/WS/SA2:ANY PERSON HE KNOWS TO BE ARMED OR ANY VEHICLE CONTAINING A WEAPON/DEF:SHALL NOT POSSESS OR DRINK ALCOHOL IN PUBLIC OR INA VEHICLE/DEF:SHALL COOPERATE WITH APD/DEF:SHALL REGISTER PER PC 186,30/X:$500 FINE WAIVED, PER NEGOTIATIONS,/DEF:SHALL PAY A $50 LAB FEE   $139,95PENALTY ASSESSMENTS = $189,95/VF4:200/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEPT/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DEF:SIGNED GANG CONDITIONS AGREEMENT/REMA/OR/TWS/PRES:02-19-09/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIM & RULING/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/HTA1:1,2/X:DEFENSE MOTION FOR OR,/OR/X:AS A CONDITIN OF OR DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO SPR IMMEDIATLY UPON RELEASE, COMPLY WITH GANG ORDER,ATTEND COLLEGE, AND REMOVE TATOO'S,/X:GANG ORDER IS SIGNED & FILED/X:EXHIBITS 2 & 3 RETURNED TO PARTIES/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:DANIEL MANNING/EXHMA:1,SFPD EVIDENCE ENVELOPE/EXHMA:1A, PLASTIC ZIPLOCK BAG CONTAINING 2 OFF WHITE ROCKS/EXHM:1B, CRIME ANALYSIS FORM/WIT SWORN:NICHOLAS CHORLEY/EXHMA:2,CERTIFIED COPYOF PRIOR RE CASE #2278703/EXHMA:3,CERTIFIED COPY OF PRIOR RE CASE #2284747/X:EXHIBITS 1,1A, AND 1B RETURNED TO OFFICER, EXHIBITS 2 AND 3 HELD BY COURT,/ /X:DEFENDANT PERSONALLY WAIVES ONE SESSION RULE,/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING & RULING/
/CAL ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:05-23-08/987,2/BAIL:60,000/CONTD:IN DEPT, 20 TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING (TIME EST: 1/2 DAY) ON 05-12-08/DOP/
/CAL:TERMINATE PROBATION/CTORD:PROBATION IN #2367271 IS HEREBY TERMINATEDAS UNSUCCESSFUL/
08    PSUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/SUPP:11-17-10/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/TBH:10015305/S23/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/
/CAL:DA MTR FILING/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S12/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/
/CAL:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/DAWT/CO:MOTION IS WITHDRAWN; PROPERTY HAD BEEN RETURNED/
/CAL: JURY TRIAL/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 21/TRANS 21:FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
/CAL:MOTION TO REVOKE RELEASE/X:MOTION IS GRANTED, ORIGINAL BAIL OF $60,000IS REINSTATED/BAIL:60000/X:TRIAL DATE IS MAINTAINED/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/GTW/987,2/
/CAL: RECEIPT OF DISCOVERY/X: PRELIM HRG OF 05-21-08 IS CONFIRMED/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIM/LD:05-23-08/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/
